tools.name: spring_find_entry
tools.description: Find Spring entry points (controllers with routes). Returns controllers and their endpoint methods.

query.description: Optional search query to filter by controller name or route path

url.description: Optional endpoint path alias for query (e.g. /api/users)

includeEndpoints.description: Include endpoint list in the response

tools.name: spring_find_feign
tools.description: Find Feign clients and their target services. Returns Feign client interfaces and their methods.

query.description: Optional search query to filter by client name or target service

clientName.description: Optional exact client name or target service

name.description: Optional alias for clientName or target service

tools.name: spring_find_mapper
tools.description: Find MyBatis mappers by namespace or method name. Returns matching mappers and their SQL methods.

query.description: Optional search query matching mapper namespace or method name

namespace.description: Optional exact mapper namespace to match

methodName.description: Optional exact method name to match

tools.name: spring_find_config
tools.description: Find Spring runtime configuration properties. Sensitive values are masked.

query.description: Optional search query matching config keys

key.description: Optional exact property key to find

tools.name: spring_nacos_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of Nacos discovery and config properties.

tools.name: spring_search_feature
tools.description: Search feature communities by name or description.

query.description: Search query matching community name or summary

tools.name: spring_assets_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of all Spring assets in the project. Returns counts of controllers, services, mappers, feign clients, etc.

tools.name: spring_trace_flow
tools.description: Trace the flow from an endpoint to its dependencies. Shows the call chain from controller to service to mapper/feign.

entryId.description: ID of the entry point to trace from (e.g., endpoint ID)
